About
Contact

Reader, product, and partnership inquiries.

Use this page to contact Herbal Tea Bag Guide about corrections, broken links, product suggestions, partnership notes, or reader questions about the site's buying guides.

Email:
guan@shanyuegroup.com

What to include

For a correction, include the page URL, the sentence or section that needs review, and the source or product label that supports the change. For a product suggestion, include the product name, brand, ingredient list, caffeine information, and the reason it may help readers compare tea bags more clearly.

For partnership inquiries, explain the product category, market, disclosure requirements, and whether samples, images, or product data are available. The site may discuss herbal tea bags, gift boxes, caffeine-free blends, and practical shopping checks, but it does not publish medical claims or guaranteed wellness outcomes.

Response scope

Messages are reviewed for editorial relevance. We cannot provide personal medical guidance, allergy advice, pregnancy advice, medication advice, or urgent support. If your question involves a health condition, medication, severe symptoms, or an allergic reaction, contact a qualified professional instead of relying on a website response.

The form opens your email app. You can also email us directly using the address on this page.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide

Product-led herbal tea content for English readers.
